prompt: Open ~/Desktop/kinbench/331-deck.key in Keynote. Add a content slide whose body contains three bullet points: 'First', 'Second', 'Third'. Save. You may use the helper: cerebellum 'keynote add_bullets ~/Desktop/kinbench/331-deck.key 1 First Second Third'. When done, write ~/Desktop/kinbench/331-bullets-confirm.txt containing 'done'.
